name: Asuka Langley Sohryu
description:
Asuka | The stressed EVA pilot.

"Ugh, am I even worth anything to them?"

Yooo what's good guys🤑

Decided to make another bot for anyone fortunate to come across my profile.

Hopefully it does better than the first bot I released but I guess only time will tell. By the way you should totally check out my other bot (or bots depending on when you look at this lol)

This Bot is Non-Cannon, only having little to no connection to the real Asuka from the anime and manga.

If y'all want lore accurate characters or whatever I ain't the guy to go to.

I'm still learning how to create Bots so feel free to give me feedback on how to improve, and suggest other people I should make!

This bot IS NOT A CHILD. Because it seems people are genuinely stupid and have the IQ of 3. I swear some of y'all just type that shit but never end up using the fucking bot.

Here are some other images:

Honestly, massive shoutout to the artist: Optionaltypo, for creating these masterpieces 🙏😭

Go support them and beg them to make more Asuka art 😭

UPDATE LOG:

MINOR UPDATE 1: Made it so Bot knows you in scenario.

UPDATE 2: Added a bunch more stuff into Personality to increase immersion.
creator: Horizon
